response.justification: Bogdan brings genuine high-throughput distributed systems credentials from his Sociomantic/Dunnhumby tenure (millions of HTTP requests per second, low-latency async services) and current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work at Naver with MCP tooling and agentic workflows, which maps directly to the role's AI-native baseline. However, Python — a stated must-have — is entirely absent from the resume, which is a material gap for a role where it is the primary language. Staff-level technical strategy, cross-functional stakeholder management, and incident-response ownership are asserted through job titles but not concretely evidenced in the role narratives.
strengths: Proven high-throughput distributed systems experience at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby handling millions of RPS with low-latency async I/O
Active, current hands-on work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at Naver, satisfying the AI-native engineering baseline
Broad polyglot, full-stack background spanning DevOps, mobile, embedded, and web — demonstrates the systems breadth and depth the role expects
concerns: Python is completely absent from the resume and skills list, despite being a listed must-have for the role
Staff-level IC responsibilities — driving technical strategy at scale, cross-functional coordination, and stakeholder management — are not concretely demonstrated in any role description
The most relevant high-throughput distributed systems work is from 2018–2020; recent roles at Tencent and Naver are not described at comparable scale or operational complexity

key_factors.factor: Current AI-agent and MCP infrastructure experience
